description: Request body for the IR scaffold bootstrap endpoint POST /v1/fix/ir (src/api/v1/fix_routes.py, class RunIRRequest). Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6), so it is constitutionally required to carry a governing schema. The endpoint is synchronous and produces no core.fix_runs row — it writes a YAML scaffold via FileHandler and returns the relative path. `kind` is required and MUST be from the closed vocabulary. Authority: ADR-056 D7 (#667).

kind.description: Closed vocabulary selecting the IR scaffold template to bootstrap. 'triage' produces a triage IR file; 'log' produces a log IR file.
